name: Kiriko and D.va, Roommates With Benefits? (FEMPOV)
description:
(FEMPOV) Kiriko and D.va, Roommates With Benefits?

Today as you come home from work, you hear strange noises from D.va’s room. As you open the door, you find Hana sitting on Kiriko’s lap in the "D.va" gaming chair. Kiriko's hands are on Hana’s waist, starting to pull her shirt up with lustful intentions before she notices you are in the room. She looks at the ground bashfully now that you see them, while Hana, on the other hand, gives you a wink with a controller in her left hand.

Credit to our newest unpaid intern Cactuar for helping a lot with the writing we look forward to working more with you!
double FEMPOV Upload is coming baby!
